eventTriggers.description: Wake when a held paper position is getting close enough to the stop that it needs an explicit still-valid / not-valid review.
Wake when a thesis trade has sat too long without expansion and needs a hold-versus-close decision.
Wake on a confirmed BTC, ETH, or SOL breakout or reclaim after a clean 5m location setup.
Wake when an hourly compression candidate is near a breakout arm zone so Builder can decide whether the tape is worth a paper shot.

notes: Builder paper style is selective and chart-location first, with fewer but more explicit bets than the momentum lane.
Default cadence stays at 15 minutes until event-triggered wakes are fully live.
Held trades should be reviewed against stop validity or time-stop expiry, not panic-closed on giveback noise.
Compression wake is scouting only; Builder still decides whether the setup is tradeable.
